LanguageData.VOE_DisableIntegrationDesc: Disables all Empire-VOE military integration. Outposts will not be raided and defensive outposts will not auto-defend.
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostDefendedDesc: Your outpost {0} successfully repelled an enemy raid.
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostRaidedDesc: Your outpost {0} was raided! {1} colonists were injured and some supplies were lost.
LanguageData.VOE_ChangeDefenderDesc: Select an Empire settlement to defend this outpost.
LanguageData.VOE_DeliveryOutpostDesc: Choose where taxes from this settlement are delivered. Currently: {0}
LanguageData.VOE_FinancingOutpostDesc: Choose an outpost to fund this settlement's payments. Currently: {0}
LanguageData.VOE_TaxRedirectedDesc: The outpost designated to receive taxes from {0} no longer exists. Shipment redirected to {1}.
LanguageData.VOE_InvalidDeliveryOutpost: {0} tried to deliver taxes to an invalid outpost. Delivery destination has been reset.
LanguageData.VOE_FinancingPartiallyDepleted: {0}'s funds are depleted. Remaining {1} silver will be drawn from your coffers.
LanguageData.VOE_DebugLoggingDesc: Enable verbose debug logging for EmpireVOE integration.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableMilitaryDesc: Outposts can be raided, defensive outposts auto-defend nearby settlements, and outposts appear in the military tab.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableDeliveryDesc: Route settlement tax deliveries to outposts instead of the player's tax map.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableFinancingDesc: Outposts can fund settlement payments from their stored silver.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableScienceLinkDesc: Science outposts can be linked to settlements to boost research production.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableEncampmentDesc: Nearby encampments boost the heal rate of mercenaries at your settlements.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableTownConversionDesc: VOE Town outposts can be converted into Empire settlements.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableRoadsDesc: The Empire road builder includes your outposts in its network, building roads to and between them alongside settlements.
LanguageData.VOE_RequireTownDesc: Empire settlements can only be founded on Town outposts.
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertTownPawnsDesc: Town pawns are transferred to the new settlement on creation.
LanguageData.VOE_NotATown: Empire settlements must be founded on Town outposts.
LanguageData.VOE_NotATownOrbitAllowed: On the surface, Empire settlements must be founded on Town outposts. Non-surface tiles have no Town requirement.
LanguageData.VOE_TownIncorporatedDesc: The town {0} has been incorporated into your new settlement {1}. {2} residents have been transferred.
LanguageData.VOE_ScienceLinkDesc: Link this science outpost to an Empire settlement to provide a research production bonus. While linked, the outpost's own research contribution is redirected.\n\nCurrently linked to: {0}
LanguageData.VOE_EncampmentHealRatePerLevel: Heal rate bonus per Medicine level
LanguageData.VOE_CodexFeatureDisabled: This feature is turned off in the mod settings.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexNoSettlements: You have not founded any settlements yet.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexOverviewDisabled: All Empire-Vanilla Outposts Expanded integration is currently disabled in the mod settings.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexOverviewNoOutposts: No outposts have been established yet.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexEncampmentNone: No settlements have an encampment within range.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexDeliveryNone: All settlements deliver their taxes to your tax map.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexFinancingNone: No settlement is financed by an outpost.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexScienceNone: No science outpost is linked to a settlement.
